joke: Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why don't kids ever want to do chores? Because they're experts at... doing nothing!
Why did the squirrel bring a ladder? To get to the nuttier side of life!
Why did time go to therapy? Because it felt like everyone was always running against it!
Why did the comma feel so insecure? Because it was always in the middle of a sentence!
Why did Santa get grumpy? He was tired of running the same old Claus every year!
Why did the banana go to the doctor? Because it wasn't peeling well!
Why did the bread go to therapy? Because it couldn't stop loafing around!
Why did the stapler go on strike? Because it felt it wasn't being properly appreciated!
Why did the tuba go to school? To learn how to play the right notes!
Why did infinity go to therapy? It didn't know where to draw the line!
Why did the comedian cry? Because the audience wouldn't let him joke about anything!
Why did the cloud refuse to tell a joke? Because it didn't have the guts to snow!
Why did the circle go to therapy? Because it couldn't stop going around in circles!
Why did the mirror break up with the lamp? Because it saw right through its bright ideas!
Why did the universe cancel its subscription? It was tired of the same old *existence*!
Why did the light bulb get a promotion? Because it finally saw the light!
Why did the wall feel lonely? Because it had too many issues!
Why did Pluto get demoted? Because it couldn't keep up with the planet's orbit!
Why did blue feel so depressed? It just wasn't feeling very cyan!
Why did nothing make noise? Because silence was too loud!
Why did the awkward conversation feel so stiff? Because it had no social lubricant!
Why did the quantum particles break up? They were too busy being in two places at once to maintain a single relationship!
Why did the sock go to therapy? Because it felt completely undressed!
Why was "perfect" so lonely? It had no flaws to bond with!
Why did the comedian go insane? Because he finally realized the audience had vetoed the entire dictionary!
Why did the coffee file a complaint? Because it was always getting mugged!
Why did the void file for unemployment? It had absolutely nothing to show for itself!
Why did the comedian stop talking? Because the audience banned every single punchline in existence!
Why did the ticklish comedian get fired? He kept taking things too personally!
